intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 0% complete. Rep 1/1. 75% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 10 minutes of base work. This feels like nothing. That's exactly the point.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 60-60% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Relax and enjoy this. You're building massive aerobic capacity.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Zone 2: where excitement goes to retire. 30s of controlled boredom.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 10 minutes of Z2. Easy effort. This is recovery in disguise.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 55%, 85-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 26% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 60% for 30s. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 30s at 60%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 60% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 26% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 27% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 27% into session. 55%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 30s of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated position, 85-95 rpm. Zone 2: building aerobic base correctly.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 33% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 33 minutes to go. Your friends are posting threshold intervals. You're being smart. Or lazy. Both?
coachingNotes.MIXED: 33% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 3:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3/7. 55% FTP, Seated. 3:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 3:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 40% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 30s at 60%. This should feel easy. If breathing hard, you're going too hard.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 40% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 40% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 40% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 55% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 3:00 at 55%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 55% for 3:00. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 55% FTP × 3:00. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 47% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 60% for 30s. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 47% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 47% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 47% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 3:00. Then 23min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 48% complete. Rep 1/1. 55% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 48% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 3:00. Then 23min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 3:00. Seated, 85-95 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway: 53% done. Patience builds power, not suffering. Stay easy.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Endurance zone: 60-60% FTP. Fat oxidation, mitochondrial biogenesis, capillary density.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Halfway: 53% complete. Your future self will thank you for these miles.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Halfway: 53% complete. Fun fact: most people go too hard on easy days. Don't be most people.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Halfway: 53% done. Keep it comfortable. Nose breathing. Enjoy the ride.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 28 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 3:00. Then 20min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 54% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 3:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Zone 2: where champions are made when no one's watching. 65%, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 60% through. Low intensity, high volume. Building the engine from ground up.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 10:00 at 65%. Base training: the secret weapon of every great cyclist.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 10:00 at 65%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 60% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 80% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 13min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 41 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% complete. Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 80% into session. 60%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.
